name: bare string with escaped newlines comes out raw
input:
"# Title

First paragraph with several words.
Second line, still prose."
expected_output:
# Title

First paragraph with several words.
Second line, still prose.

name: github issue metadata tags then body
input:
{"title":"Panic when config missing","number":1347,"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"labels":["bug","p1"],"body":"Running ccx with no config panics.

Steps to reproduce:
1. rm ~/.ccx.toml
2. ccx repo overview

Expected an error, got a panic."}
expected_output:
<title>Panic when config missing</title>
<number>1347</number>
<state>open</state>
<locked>false</locked>
<assignee>null</assignee>
<labels>["bug","p1"]</labels>

Running ccx with no config panics.

Steps to reproduce:
1. rm ~/.ccx.toml
2. ccx repo overview

Expected an error, got a panic.

name: nested object residual as compact JSON in its tag
input: {"user":{"login":"yasyf","id":9223372036854775807},"body":"A multi word prose body that dominates this payload."}
expected_output:
<user>{"login":"yasyf","id":9223372036854775807}</user>

A multi word prose body that dominates this payload.

name: bigint metadata field digit-exact
input: {"id":98765432109876543210987654321098765432,"body":"big integers ride along untouched in their tag"}
expected_output:
<id>98765432109876543210987654321098765432</id>

big integers ride along untouched in their tag

name: angle brackets in prose body pass through raw
input: {"note":"see below","body":"Render bold & italic — raw angle brackets and ampersands survive unescaped."}
expected_output: see below Render bold & italic — raw angle brackets and ampersands survive unescaped.

name: largest multi-word string wins over single-token blob
input: {"blob":"AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA","summary":"a short multi word summary is still the only prose candidate"}
expected_output:
<blob>AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA</blob>

a short multi word summary is still the only prose candidate

name: smaller prose field rides along as a tag
input: {"tldr":"short prose here","body":"the substantially longer prose body wins the dominance contest outright"}
expected_output:
<tldr>short prose here</tldr>

the substantially longer prose body wins the dominance contest outright

name: string metadata with newline stays raw inside its tag
input: {"sig":"line one\nline two","body":"the actual prose body is comfortably larger than the signature"}
expected_output:
<sig>line one
line two</sig>

the actual prose body is comfortably larger than the signature

name: only-prose object emits body alone with no blank line
input: {"body":"just the prose body and nothing else at all"}
expected_output: just the prose body and nothing else at all
